svg.title: Access is not appropriation
svg.desc: Two phase maps plot the fraction of learning available through customer access horizontally and the platform's share of AI-created operating value vertically. When customer conflict is high, low provider capture supports a full rollup even at complete external learning access, while high access and high capture support a neutral platform. When customer conflict is low, partial platform-owner structures survive.
